owner_priority: Reach the first functional owner-testable Strategic Nexus v0 as quickly as safely possible; defer polish until the real-game validation loop exists. New approved direction: prove the smallest legal reactive policy-pack slice so a loaded mod can react in-session through precompiled branches.
selection_rule: Take owner-approved suggestion chunks first, then the first ready unblocked roadmap chunk in order, unless current code already satisfies it; reactive policy-pack chunks supersede polish/convenience chunks when generated-overlay gameplay effect is the blocker; then verify and record evidence.
exhaustion_rule: If all queued chunks are completed while the roadmap still contains unblocked IN_PROGRESS or NOT_STARTED work, refresh this queue from the roadmap or implement the next obvious bounded roadmap chunk; do not end with no_safe_task.
chunk_finish_rule: Targeted validation, fail-safe behavior for unsafe inputs where applicable, one coherent commit before the next implementation chunk.
current_source: Tray JSON and tray brief now both surface the ready-state owner-test playbook path while non-ready states stay silent; the next bounded owner-facing gap is aligning tray next_action metadata with that ready monthly reactive owner-test contract.

chunks.title: Align tray owner-test next action
chunks.goal: When the monthly reactive owner-test contract is genuinely ready and no higher-priority blocker exists, align tray next_action metadata with that owner-test state instead of leaving review_tray_status.
acceptance: Ready-state tray JSON exposes next_action metadata for the monthly reactive owner test instead of the generic review_tray_status fallback.
The tray keeps fail-closed behavior for non-ready states and for higher-priority MP mismatch or publish-gate blockers.
Action path and command-hint choices reuse the existing owner_test_playbook_path or acceptance artifact instead of inventing a parallel owner-test surface.

chunks.title: Refresh progress after tray owner-test next action
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Task Board And Owner Report Log
chunks.goal: Keep roadmap notes, sprint queue, and today's owner-facing daily summary aligned after tray next_action metadata is aligned with the owner-test contract.
acceptance: Roadmap notes mention the shipped tray next_action owner-test alignment.
The sprint queue advances to the next missing bounded roadmap slice instead of leaving the tray owner-test next-action chunk as the head item.
The daily freework report for 2026-06-06 is replaced, not duplicated.
